query:
SELECT 
  u.role,
  u.name,
  COUNT(l.id) as total_leads
FROM leads l
LEFT JOIN users u ON u.id = l.corretorId
GROUP BY u.role, u.name
ORDER BY total_leads DESC
LIMIT 20;
